title: Dekton 10MM x 4.6M Flexible Steel Cable | Heavy-Duty Cut-Resistant Cable with Durable PVC Coating | Ideal for Securing Bikes, Scooters, Gates & Outdoor Equipment | Weatherproof for Long-Lasting Use
features: Heavy-Duty 10MM Steel Cable: Constructed with a robust 10MM thick steel cable, this Dekton flexible steel cable provides exceptional strength and cut resistance. It’s designed to withstand significant force, making it ideal for securing valuable items and equipment in various settings.

Durable PVC Coating for Protection: The cable features a durable PVC coating that protects it from weather elements, corrosion, and abrasion. This coating not only extends the lifespan of the cable but also prevents damage to the surfaces it comes into contact with, ensuring reliable performance over time.

Flexible Design for Versatility: With its flexible construction, this steel cable is easy to maneuver and wrap around objects of different shapes and sizes. The flexibility enhances its usability, making it suitable for a wide range of applications, including securing bikes, scooters, gates, and more.

Ideal for Outdoor Use: Engineered to endure harsh environmental conditions, this cable is perfect for outdoor use. Whether you’re securing equipment in your yard, locking up tools in the garage, or chaining up a bike, the Dekton cable provides dependable security and durability.

4.6M Length for Versatile Applications: At 4.6 meters in length, this steel cable offers ample length to handle various locking and securing needs. Its extended reach allows for versatility in securing multiple items or larger objects, making it a practical choice for both residential and commercial use.
description: From the manufacturer 10MM x 4.6M HIGH SECURITY MULTI-FUNCTION FLEXIBLE STEEL CABLE Heavy duty multi strand twisted steel cable with protective PVC coating. Water resistant tough and durable. Excellent defence against cutting through securely crimped end loops. Long cable (4.6m) giving excellent coverage suitable for a multitude of jobs. Ideal for motorbikes, bicycles, ladders and more. ADVANCED LEVEL OF SECURITY MULTI STRAND TWISTED STEEL CABLE Made of 10mm thick twisted steel cable and covered with PVC protection. The length of the cable is 4.6m, long enough to protect bicycles, scooters, doors or other items from theft. SECURE CRIMPED END LOOPS The bike lock comes with a mounting holder, and the self-coiling cable can be clipped to the bracket when not in use for easy carrying. It will not deform under high temperature. IDEAL FOR USE WITH A PADLOCK 5 digit combination increases the level of protection against unwanted access. 100,000 possible combinations. Wheels tightly fixed, making decoding almost impossible. IDEAL FOR SECURING Motorbikes / Bicycles. Tools / Gardening equipment. Ladders. Doors/ Gates. Sheds / Fences. Factories / Garages. Residential / Commercial property. 10 X 1200MM 4 DIGIT COMBINATION CABLE LOCK WITH HOLDER 12 X 1500MM 5 DIGIT COMBINATION CABLE LOCK WITH HOLDER 10MM X 1.8M FLEXIBLE STEEL CABLE PADLOCK 2.5M X 8MM FLEXIBLE STEEL CABLE AND 50MM PADLOCK SET 4 DIGIT COMBINATION KEY SAFE BOX Buying Options Buying Options Add To Basket Buying Options Buying Options Price — no data — no data £8.99 £ 8 . 99 — no data — no data Application Residential / Commercial property, Factories / Garages, Sheds / Fences, Doors / Gates, Motorbikes / Bicycles, Tools / Gardening equipment, Ladders.
